mapper.select: SELECT * FROM process_step WHERE route_id = #{routeId} AND is_delete = 0 ORDER BY sort_order ASC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO process_step (route_id, step_code, step_name, workstation_id, sort_order, standard_time, qc_required, is_delete) VALUES
(#{item.routeId}, #{item.stepCode}, #{item.stepName}, #{item.workstationId}, #{item.sortOrder}, #{item.standardTime}, #{item.qcRequired}, 0)
